name: Navneet Kumar Mridul
tagline: Full Stack Developer specializing in MERN and software development, building reliable, scalable web applications.
summary: Software engineering graduate with hands-on experience building responsive web applications and REST APIs using the MERN stack.
about: I focus on translating requirements into clear and reliable full-stack applications with structured logic and clean implementation.
My core strengths include building responsive user interfaces, integrating APIs, and implementing backend functionalities in full-stack systems.
I bring strong problem-solving discipline from extensive DSA practice and apply that thinking to write efficient and reliable code.
